sentences.arabic: صَدَرَ قَانُونٌ جَدِيدٌ لِتَحْسِينِ الخِدْمَاتِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ فِي جَمِيعِ المُسْتَشْفَيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Donesen je novi zakon za poboljšanje zdravstvenih usluga u svim bolnicama.
sentences.translationEn: A new law was issued to improve health services in all hospitals.

sentences.arabic: يَسْمَحُ هَذَا القَانُونُ لِلْمُواطِنِينَ بِالْحُصُولِ عَلَى العِلَاجِ المَجَّانِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj zakon omogućava građanima besplatno liječenje.
sentences.translationEn: This law allows citizens to receive free treatment.

sentences.arabic: سَتَقُومُ الوِزَارَةُ بِبِنَاءِ مَرَاكِزَ طِبِّيَّةٍ حَدِيثَةٍ فِي القُرَى البَعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ministarstvo će izgraditi moderne medicinske centre u udaljenim selima.
sentences.translationEn: The ministry will build modern medical centers in remote villages.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا المَشْرُوعُ إِلَى تَوْفِيرِ الرِّعَايَةِ لِكِبَارِ السِّنِّ وَالأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat ima za cilj pružanje njege starijim osobama i djeci.
sentences.translationEn: This project aims to provide care for the elderly and children.

sentences.arabic: عَبَّرَ النَّاسُ عَنْ سَعَادَتِهِمْ بِهَذِهِ القَرَارَاتِ المُهِمَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su izrazili sreću zbog ovih važnih odluka.
sentences.translationEn: People expressed their happiness with these important decisions.
